title: Production Readiness Audit
currentArchitectureStrengths: Central UI components are audited and integrated.
Feature Modules are present for the main operational domains.
Classic adapters preserve compatibility while the legacy runtime is gradually migrated.
Print, storage, UI migration, runtime, architecture and feature-module audits are integrated into quality:full.
The project remains runnable as a local MVP without requiring a backend server.

hardProductionBlockers.finding: No real backend/API layer for multi-tenant SaaS operations.
hardProductionBlockers.requiredAction: Build API service, persistence boundaries, validation, authorization and request auditing.

hardProductionBlockers.finding: Operational data is still browser/local-storage based.
hardProductionBlockers.requiredAction: Move hotel, room, reservation, staff, payment and report data to a production database with migrations and backups.

hardProductionBlockers.finding: Authentication is not production-grade and is not backed by server-side sessions/tokens.
hardProductionBlockers.requiredAction: Implement secure login, password hashing, refresh/session handling, reset flow and account lockout.
Implement role-based access checks on every API action and tenant boundary.

hardProductionBlockers.finding: Financial records are not immutable server-side ledger entries.
hardProductionBlockers.requiredAction: Implement ledger tables, audit trails, receipt numbering, cancellation policies and reconciliation.

hardProductionBlockers.finding: Backup is local/export oriented, not a managed production recovery strategy.
hardProductionBlockers.requiredAction: Add automated database backups, restore drills and retention policy.

hardProductionBlockers.finding: No production logging, error tracking, metrics, uptime checks or alerting.
hardProductionBlockers.requiredAction: Add structured logs, request IDs, error tracking and monitoring dashboards.

hardProductionBlockers.finding: No production deployment pipeline, environment model, secrets policy or security hardening.
hardProductionBlockers.requiredAction: Add CI/CD, environment configs, HTTPS, CSP/security headers, secrets management and dependency scanning.

recommendedNextPhases: Tenant isolation and owner panel hardening
End-to-end browser tests for critical flows
